summary: Iteration 14 Testing Complete - All 14 backend tests passed, Frontend verification complete. New features: Market data ultra-fast refresh (500ms polling), OI Buildup alerts with support/resistance/PCR/buildup detection, Auto-exit now includes live_exits field.
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 features fully tested. Market data quick endpoint works (returns source=none when Upstox not connected - expected). OI Buildup alerts panel shows support/resistance/PCR/buildup alerts with severity badges. Auto-exit endpoint includes live_exits field. OI data is SIMULATED using Black-Scholes model. Live trade execution requires real Upstox credentials.

api_verified.GET /api/market-data/quick: 200 OK - returns status, data, source, ts
api_verified.source_values: ws_cache, rest, or none (none when Upstox disconnected)

market_data_quick.notes: Returns source=none when Upstox is not connected - this is expected behavior per design
